# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kafka topic authorization and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Configuration - Production Deployment
# server.properties

############################# Server Basics #############################

# Unique broker ID for this node in the cluster
broker.id=0

############################# Socket Server Settings #############################

# Listeners configuration with security protocols
listeners=SASL_SSL://0.0.0.0:9093,SSL://0.0.0.0:9094
advertised.listeners=SASL_SSL://kafka-broker-0.example.com:9093,SSL://kafka-broker-0.example.com:9094

# Listener security protocol mapping
listener.security.protocol.map=SASL_SSL:SASL_SSL,SSL:SSL

# Inter-broker communication protocol
security.inter.broker.protocol=SASL_SSL
inter.broker.listener.name=SASL_SSL

# SASL mechanism for inter-broker communication
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=SCRAM-SHA-512
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=SCRAM-SHA-512,SCRAM-SHA-256

# SSL Configuration
ssl.keystore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=changeit
ssl.key.password=changeit
ssl.truststore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=changeit
ssl.client.auth=required
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.3,TLSv1.2
ssl.protocol=TLSv1.3
ssl.cipher.suites=TLS_AES_256_GCM_SHA384,TLS_AES_128_GCM_SHA256

# Number of threads handling network requests
num.network.threads=8

# Number of threads doing disk I/O
num.io.threads=16

# Send buffer size
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400

# Receive buffer size
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400

# Maximum request size
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

############################# Log Basics #############################

# Directory for Kafka log data
log.dirs=/var/kafka/data-1,/var/kafka/data-2,/var/kafka/data-3

# Default number of log partitions per topic
num.partitions=3

# Number of threads per data directory for log recovery and flushing
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

############################# Internal Topic Settings #############################

# Replication factor for internal topics
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2

############################# Log Retention Policy #############################

# Log retention hours
log.retention.hours=168

# Log retention bytes per partition
log.retention.bytes=1073741824

# Maximum size of a log segment file
log.segment.bytes=1073741824

# Interval for checking log segments for deletion
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

############################# Replication Settings #############################

# Default replication factor for automatically created topics
default.replication.factor=3

# Minimum number of in-sync replicas
min.insync.replicas=2

# Unclean leader election disabled for data consistency
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Auto create topics disabled for better control
auto.create.topics.enable=false

# Maximum time a follower can be out of sync
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000

# Socket timeout for network requests to followers
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000

# Fetch size for replication
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

############################# Zookeeper Settings #############################

# Zookeeper connection string
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.example.com:2181,zk-2.example.com:2181,zk-3.example.com:2181/kafka

# Timeout for connecting to Zookeeper
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000

# Session timeout for Zookeeper
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Enable secure Zookeeper connection
zookeeper.set.acl=true
zookeeper.ssl.client.enable=true
zookeeper.clientCnxnSocket=org.apache.zookeeper.ClientCnxnSocketNetty
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.keystore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.keystore.password=changeit
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.location=/var/private/ssl/kafka.server.truststore.jks
zookeeper.ssl.truststore.password=changeit

############################# Authorization & Authentication #############################

# Enable authorization
authorizer.class.name=kafka.security.authorizer.AclAuthorizer

# Super users who have access to all resources
super.users=User:admin;User:kafka-broker

# Allow everyone if no ACL is found - DISABLED for security
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=false

# SASL JAAS configuration
sasl.jaas.config=org.apache.kafka.common.security.scram.ScramLoginModule required;

############################# Group Coordinator Settings #############################

# Delay for initial consumer rebalance
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000

# Maximum session timeout
group.max.session.timeout.ms=300000

############################# Performance & Reliability #############################

# Compression type
compression.type=snappy

# Number of fetcher threads
num.replica.fetchers=4

# Maximum bytes in a fetch request
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

# Background threads for various tasks
background.threads=10

# Enable rack awareness for replica placement
broker.rack=rack1

# Message timestamp type
log.message.timestamp.type=CreateTime

# Maximum difference between timestamp and broker time
log.message.timestamp.difference.max.ms=9223372036854775807

############################# Quota Configuration #############################

# Producer quota - bytes per second
quota.producer.default=10485760

# Consumer quota - bytes per second
quota.consumer.default=10485760

# Request percentage quota
quota.window.num=11
quota.window.size.seconds=1

############################# Monitoring & Metrics #############################

# Metrics reporters
metric.reporters=

# Number of samples for metrics
metrics.num.samples=2

# Metrics sample window
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000

# JMX port for monitoring
jmx.port=9999

############################# Security Hardening #############################

# Disable delete topic by default
delete.topic.enable=false

# Connection rate limiting
max.connections.per.ip=100
max.connections.per.ip.overrides=127.0.0.1:200

# Maximum connections
max.connections=1000

# Control plane listener for separation of control and data plane
control.plane.listener.name=SASL_SSL

# Enable token authentication
delegation.token.master.key=changeit
delegation.token.max.lifetime.ms=604800000
delegation.token.expiry.time.ms=86400000
